author: alimoeeny
description: Fetch images from your dropbox based on date or path

manifest.author: Ali Moeeny
manifest.description: Display and embed photos from your Dropbox account in a customizable grid layout
manifest.name: Dropbox Photo Grid

name: Dropbox Photo Grid

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
- click on an image in the grid to see it "fullscreen"
- in "fullscreen" mode if you press " i "  you can see metadata about the image. and even can fetch the image to show exiff and location data about it.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alimoeeny/obsidian-dropbox-photo-grid/compare/1.0.6...1.0.8
releases.name: 1.0.8 show image metadata

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
- removed the version number from the top of the settings page
- now you can cycle through the images in a grid in fullscreen mode by using the right and left arrow keys
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alimoeeny/obsidian-dropbox-photo-grid/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
Following generous feedback from obsidian developers:
1. Version in manifest file
1. desktop only: true (because of dropbox auth)
1. removed as much of node and electron api as possible and replaced with obsidian implementations (requestUrl)
1. removed unneeded logging to console
1. moved all styling from js to css (and added a css file to this release)
1. Cleaned up settings panel by avoiding the header
1. Used sentence case in settings

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alimoeeny/obsidian-dropbox-photo-grid/compare/v1.0.4...1.0.5

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
Added "click to enlarge" feature. 
If you click on any of the images in the grid of pictures, it will enlarge to cover most of the screen.
releases.name: v1.0.4

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
Improved the plugin by not using innerHTML and generally cleaning up.
Also added the plugin version to the plugin settings tab. 
some more testing and minor changes.

releases.author: alimoeeny
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alimoeeny/obsidian-dropbox-photo-grid/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

Corrected the plugin id by removing the word obsidian from the id. 
Minor version bump
